name: Low Fat Pepper Steak from Carol Creel
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless top round steak, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a skillet with cooking spray.
2. Saute the beef and remove it from the skillet.
3. Saute the onion and garlic in the skillet until tender.
4. Add pepper and a small amount of water to the onion and garlic; cover and cook on low heat until tender.
5. Sprinkle with bouillon granules and add teriyaki sauce and 2/3 cup water.
6. In a measuring cup, make a paste with 1/4 cup hot water and cornstarch.
7. Pour the paste into the skillet and cook for a few minutes until thick.
8. Add tomato and cook until tender.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice.
